walking.route_name: NW 23rd Ave → W Burnside → SW King → SW Salmon → SW Park → SW Madison
walking.rating: Very Good - Enjoyable walk through tree-lined NW 23rd, across Burnside, through downtown
walking.sidewalk_quality: Excellent - ADA compliant, wide sidewalks throughout route

bicycling.route_name: NW 23rd Ave protected bike lane → W Burnside → downtown
infrastructure: Free bike corrals on SW Madison

public_transit.route_name: Portland Streetcar NS Line then B Loop

car.notes: Moderate morning congestion on Burnside/SW Salmon; light on NW 23rd Ave
car.parking: Downtown metered on SW Madison and Burnside; free on Sundays

bike_commute_benefits: Health benefits: ~30 min exercise/day walking/biking to transit
Avoid downtown parking costs ($12-15/day in downtown lot)
NW 23rd Ave is one of Portland's best protected bike corridors

data_metadata.source: OpenStreetMap + TriMet GTFS + City of Portland Bike Map
